studio.name: KCDanceHQ
studio.description: Four modernised homepage directions for KCDanceHQ, prepared for review.
studio.heading: KCDanceHQ, modernised.
studio.intro: Four directions that modernise your current site rather than reinvent it. Same brand colours, same logo, same overall structure and photography style. Open each one to compare the feel, the typography, and the parent journey, then tell us which direction to take further.

templates.label: Demo 1
templates.title: Premium Minimalist
templates.description: A refined, whitespace-led modernisation on a neutral cream canvas, with your brand pink used as a deliberate accent. Built to feel calm, premium and trustworthy for parents researching seriously.

templates.label: Demo 2
templates.title: Warm Contemporary
templates.description: Keeps the warmth and energy of your current site, refreshed with a full-bleed photographic hero, contemporary card and grid patterns, modern motion and tighter typography. Emotive, but polished.

templates.label: Demo 3
templates.title: Premium Minimalist Modernisation
templates.description: A quieter parent-research path that keeps KC's brand assets intact while refining typography, whitespace, class discovery and trial-booking flow.

templates.label: Demo 4
templates.title: Warm Contemporary Modernisation
templates.description: A warmer, more energetic refinement of the current site, with richer photography, contemporary grids, polished motion and clearer enrolment moments.
